creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Tea Time @breadaheaduae but make it #WesAnderson!

I’m loving this accidentally Wes Anderson trend, I have to hop into it with the clips we took at Bread Ahead early this month.  I edited it here on Insta so you can easily recreate it with my template. 🥰

I guess everyone’s familiar with Bread Ahead. It’s the super tasty, fluffy and heavenly filled doughnuts that became viral in Expo 2020. We had Banana Chocolate Hazelnut (20 AED) and Blackcurrant Cheesecake (18 AED).

Tag your foodie besties and try it soon if you haven’t yet.
